title: Used Perplexity Computer + a open-sourced API from Public to build an interactive options dashboard in under 5 minutes. No code written.
author: BuildwithPublic
selftext:
I've been experimenting here with using AI agents as actual trading tools (not just "ask ChatGPT what stock to buy" stuff - real infrastructure.

Yesterday I gave Perplexity Computer a single prompt and a free API key from Public it built me a full interactive options intelligence dashboard. Live data, not mock data.

**What it does:**

* **Volatility Smile / Skew** \-plots IV across strikes for nearest expiry, with a strike zoom slider to drill into ATM range
* **Volume & Open Interest** \-bar chart with call/put OI and volume overlay by strike
* **Greek Exposure Heatmap** \- color-coded Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega across all strikes for calls and puts
* **Iron Condor Builder** \-4 draggable sliders (buy put, sell put, sell call, buy call), live P&L diagram, max profit/loss, breakevens, estimated probability of profit
* **Ticker switching** \- NVDA, AAPL, TSLA, MSFT, META, AMZN, SPY
* **KPI cards** \- ATM IV, put/call ratio, straddle price, max pain, implied move

**The prompt was basically:** "Connect to the Public API with my key, pull the full NVDA options chain, calculate Greeks across all strikes, and build me an interactive options dashboard with vol smile, volume/OI, Greek heatmap, and an iron condor builder."

The agent handled the API calls, data processing, Greek calculations, chart rendering, and deployment.

**What I think is actually interesting here:**

This isn't about replacing Bloomberg or TOS. It's about the fact that a single natural language prompt can now produce a functional analytical tool with live market data and execution. The barrier to building custom trading tools just dropped to zero.

Not saying this replaces a proper backtest framework or production algo. But for rapid prototyping, screening ideas, or building one-off analysis tools? This is a different game now.

Happy to answer questions about the setup or share the exact prompt/approach.

**Live dashboard:** \[link in comments\]

https://reddit.com/link/1s5cees/video/n0z44xlzrmrg1/player

comments.author: BuildwithPublic
comments.body:
Live dashboard: [https://www.perplexity.ai/computer/a/options-intelligence-dashboard-XC2EmfERQteurhivZSamHA](https://www.perplexity.ai/computer/a/options-intelligence-dashboard-XC2EmfERQteurhivZSamHA)

Free API key: [https://public.com/api](https://public.com/api)

The API gives you real-time quotes, options chains with Greeks, account data, and order execution. No payment info required for the data endpoints.

[https://public.com/api/docs/templates/perplexity-agent-skill](https://public.com/api/docs/templates/perplexity-agent-skill)
